name: DataResource
description: Profile for digital data resources specifying format, location, licensing, and integrity verification information.
ExpectedUse: Metadata for downloadable data files, bitstreams, and digital objects requiring format specification, access locations, license terms, and integrity verification.

Properties.Name: mimeType
Properties.Title: Media Type
Properties.Description: Media type (MIME type) identifier specifying the format of a digital resource or bitstream.

Properties.Name: dataObjectLocation
Properties.Title: Data Object Location
Properties.Description: URL(s) pointing to the location(s) where the actual digital object bitstream or data file can be accessed or downloaded.

Properties.Name: spdxLicense
Properties.Title: SPDX License
Properties.Description: SPDX license URL(s) specifying the license terms under which a resource is distributed.

Properties.Name: checksum
Properties.Title: Checksum
Properties.Description: Cryptographic checksum value for verifying data integrity and detecting file corruption or tampering.
